category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-flamegraph provides easy flamegraphs for Rust projects and everything else.
source_facts.homepage points to the official flamegraph-rs/flamegraph repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; no dedicated docs URL is supplied in source_facts, so the official README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/flamegraph-rs/flamegraph, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions flamegraphs for Rust projects.
